part.partDescription: Chrome Legend Handlebar Mounted Control Assembly - FL
part.productName: Chrome Legend Handlebar Mounted Control Assembly
part.bullet1: Replaces black handlebar control that come as standard equipment in all Legend Air Ride kits
part.bullet2: Deutsch style wire connector is compatible with all current generation NAMZ/Legend wire harnesses ('15+)
part.bullet3: Fits all Legend AIR and AIR-A kits sold since '15.
part.bullet4: Does not work with L2/L8 Softail Kits.

part.partDescription: Standard AXEO Front Suspension - 49 mm - '17-'18 Trike
part.productName: AXEO Tri-Glide Front Suspension System
part.bullet1: Designed to be used with stock diameter front wheels
part.bullet2: Easy installation
part.bullet3: Includes two mono-tube, dual chambered damper cartridges, and two top out springs
part.bullet4: Performance spring rate
part.bullet5: Machined 303 Stainless threaded pre-load adjuster
part.bullet6: Increased pre-load range allows the tuning for various riding styles and weights
part.bullet7: Ride quality is smooth and controlled
part.bullet8: Improves stability, cornering, and traction
part.bullet9: Eliminates front-end dive during aggressive braking and maneuvering
part.bullet10: Firm feel for high-speed sweeping turns
part.bullet11: Eliminates bottoming out on large bumps or potholes
part.bullet12: Designed for optimum performance with Legend rear suspensions
part.bullet13: For Stock Fork Tubes
part.bullet14: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD USA

part.partDescription: AXEO43 Inverted High-Performance Front End Suspension System - 43 mm
part.productName: AXEO43 Performance Front Suspension
part.bullet1: Replaces the asymmetrical stock fork internals with a high-performance twin cartridge set
part.bullet2: Designed to be used with stock diameter front wheels
part.bullet3: Easy installation
part.bullet4: Includes two mono-tube, dual chambered damper cartridges
part.bullet5: Performance spring rate
part.bullet6: Machined 303 Stainless threaded pre-load adjuster
part.bullet7: Internal linear spring guide and polyurethane bump stop are unique to the Legend Axeo43 system
part.bullet8: Ride quality is smooth and controlled
part.bullet9: Improves stability, cornering, and traction
part.bullet10: Eliminates front-end dive during aggressive braking and maneuvering
part.bullet11: Firm feel for high-speed sweeping turns
part.bullet12: Eliminates bottoming out on large bumps or potholes
part.bullet13: Reduces dragging floorboards and pegs
part.bullet14: Designed for optimum performance with Legend rear suspensions
part.bullet15: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD USA

part.partDescription: AXEO Performance Front Suspension - 41 mm - +2"
part.productName: +2" AXEO Performance Front Suspension
part.bullet1: Performance spring rate delivers agile handling for aggressive riders without sacrificing comfort
part.bullet2: Specifically designed to increase ride height on FL touring models
part.bullet3: Imporves cornering clearance, lean angles, and eliminates dragging floorboards and footpegs
part.bullet4: Improves straight-line stability, high-speed cornering, and maneuverability
part.bullet5: Increases resistance to bottoming out on large bumps or potholes
part.bullet6: Threaded pre-load adjuster allows tuning for various rider weights and increased pre-load range
part.bullet7: Reduces front-end dive and improves front tire traction under aggressive braking
part.bullet8: Designed for optimum performance with Legend's 14" Revo-Arc rear suspensions
part.bullet9: Includes two 2" over monotube, dual chambered damper cartridges, and two top out springs
part.bullet10: Designed to be used with stock diameter front wheels
part.bullet11: For Extended Fork Tubes.

part.partDescription: Travel Limiting Kit - 41 mm
part.productName: AXEO Travel Limiting Kit For 21" Wheels
part.bullet1: Designed specifically for use with aftermarket 21" wheels
part.bullet2: Prevents front fender from contacting the lower triple clamp or fairing at full bottom-out
part.bullet3: Kit includes two 1" travel limiters
part.bullet4: Only compatible with Axeo Performance Cartridge Kit 0414-0748
part.bullet5: For Stock Fork Tubes
part.bullet6: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Travel Limiting Kit - 41 mm
part.productName: AXEO Travel Limiting Kit For 23" Wheels
part.bullet1: Designed specifically for use with aftermarket 23" wheels
part.bullet2: Only compatible with Axeo Performance Cartridge Kit 0414-0748
part.bullet3: Prevents front fender from contacting the lower triple clamp or fairing at full bottom-out
part.bullet4: Installing the Axeo Travel Limiting Kit for 23" wheels requires the separate purchase and installation of 7­° raked triple trees
part.bullet5: Kit includes two 1.25" travel limiters

part.bullet7: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Revo FL Coil Suspension - 12" - Black - Standard
part.productName: REVO FL Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: Available only in Black Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet2: Legend's touring specific coil spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet3: Adjusts by hand, no tools needed
part.bullet4: Available in 12" and 13", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet5: Easy installation and alignment, provided by spherical bearings on both top and bottom mounting points
part.bullet6: High-flow piston reacts quickly for improved fluid flow management
part.bullet7: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet8: Low friction sealing system and sliding bearings for improved performance and feel
part.bullet9: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD USA

part.partDescription: REVO-A Adjustable Dyna Coil Suspension - 13" - Black - Standard
part.productName: Legend REVO-A Coil Suspension For Dyna Models
part.bullet1: Available in Black, Gold and Clear Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet2: Legend's touring specific coil spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet3: Adjusts by hand, no tools needed
part.bullet4: Available in 12", 13", and 14", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet5: Easy installation and alignment, provided by spherical bearings on both top and bottom mounting points
part.bullet6: All the benefits of the REVO shocks above plus six external knob adjustments allow fine-tuning of rebound
part.bullet7: Provides optimum rebound performance for any given rider weight, personal ride quality preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet8: Light to heavy riders can fine-tune ride preference
part.bullet9: Aggressive to casual riding styles can tune to desired quality or personal preference
part.bullet10: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD USA

part.partDescription: REVO-A Coil Suspension - Black
part.productName: REVO-A Adjustable Scout Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: Provides improved plush ride quality, control, and resistance to bottoming out
part.bullet2: Extended coil length has larger “sweet spot” without increasing overall shock length
part.bullet3: Unique spring rate offers the ability to soften pre-load, reducing ride height and maintaining a smooth ride
part.bullet4: Allows minimal pre-load adjustments when changing between riders’ weights or loads
part.bullet5: Adjusts by hand, no tools needed
part.bullet6: Easy installation
part.bullet7: Suspension alignment is provided by spherical bearings on both top and bottom
part.bullet8: External knob has six adjustments allow fine-tuning of rebound
part.bullet9: Provides optimum rebound performance for any given rider weight, personal ride quality preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet10: Light to heavy riders can fine-tune ride preference
part.bullet11: Black finish
part.bullet12: Made in the U.S.A.

part.partDescription: Shock Springs - Rear - Heavy Duty
part.productName: Rear Shock Spring
part.bullet1: Collaboration with Dirt Bike Kidz and Legend Suspensions
part.bullet2: Spring material is chrome silicon high tensile
part.bullet3: Springs are shot peened and preset to eliminate sag over time
part.bullet4: Weighs less than stock spring
part.bullet5: Standard spring rate is 75% stiffer than stock
part.bullet6: Heavy duty spring rate is 140% stiffer than stock
part.bullet7: Better bottoming resistance
part.bullet8: Designed for Adult or Large riders
part.bullet9: Retains overall stock spring length
part.bullet10: Easy installation
part.bullet11: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: REVO ATS Adjustable Air-Assisted Coil Suspension System
part.productName: REVO ATS - UTV Suspension System
part.bullet1: Legend’s patented design features an independently adjustable (front-to-rear) air-assisted coil suspension for hard-working utility UTV's
part.bullet2: Industry-exclusive, integrated helper air springs, offer a wide range of adjustability to improve ground clearance, chassis leveling, and reduce bottoming under heavy loads
part.bullet3: Designed to optimize ride quality and maintain the factory ride height of UTV's regardless of cargo, accessory, or attachment weights
part.bullet4: Custom coil spring rates improve ride quality when UTV is in an unloaded state
part.bullet5: Engineered to allow UTV's to be loaded to the OE manufacturer's GVWR without jeopardizing stability, safety, or comfort
part.bullet6: Aramid fiber-impregnated air springs provide high puncture resistance and unmatched durability
part.bullet7: Features heavy-duty 46 mm billet aluminum dampers with 16 mm hard chrome shafts for exceptional strength
part.bullet8: Easy access knob allows tool-free rebound adjustment for precise, fast, and repeatable adjustments for fine-tuning ride quality and performance across the entire damping profile
part.bullet9: Type III hard coat anodized for a long-lasting, durable finish
part.bullet10: Spherical bearings in mounting points eliminate suspension bind throughout the range of suspension travel
part.bullet11: Air pressure adjustments are easily made via a one-touch, wireless remote control and/or a Bluetooth mobile app
part.bullet12: Kit includes four shock assemblies, pre-mounted compressor assembly, remote control, wire harness, airline, and air fittings for easy installation
part.bullet13: Made in the USA
part.bullet14: Compatible with stock A-arms, not to be used with or as a lift kit.
part.bullet15: Not to be used with or as a lift kit.

part.partDescription: Revo-A Shock - 12.5" - Standard
part.productName: Revo-A Mono Softail Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: Revo-A coil designed specifically for M-8 Softail models
part.bullet2: Available in 12.5", 13", and 13.5", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet3: Adjustable preload for rider set up, also allows for minimal pre-load adjustment when changing between rider's weights and loads
part.bullet4: Legend's touring specific spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet5: Features adjustable rebound damping that is specifically designed to make fast, precise, and repeatable changes to ride comfort and performance with a simple turn of a knob
part.bullet6: Provides optimum rebound performance that can be fine-tuned for any given rider weight, personal ride preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet7: Low friction sleeve bearings both top and bottom for ease of installation, this also allows the shock to float in its mount and avoid shock bind
part.bullet8: Hard anodized, 46 mm billet aluminum mono tube design utilizes a lightweight high flow piston design for improved fluid flow resulting in unmatched handling and bike control
part.bullet9: Hard chromed shaft is 14% larger for increased strength
part.bullet10: Internal floating nitrogen piston ensures consistent damping performance
part.bullet11: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet12: Legend's durable and low friction sealing system and sliding bearings provide improved performance and feel
part.bullet13: Available in Black Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet14: Easy installation that utilizes the OEM mounting hardware
part.bullet15: Included preload wrench makes adjusting easy

part.partDescription: Revo-A Shock - 12.5" - Heavy Duty
part.productName: Revo-A Mono Softail Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: Revo-A coil designed specifically for M-8 Softail models
part.bullet2: Available in 12.5", 13", and 13.5", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet3: Adjustable preload for rider set up, also allows for minimal pre-load adjustment when changing between rider's weights and loads
part.bullet4: Legend's touring specific spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet5: Features adjustable rebound damping that is specifically designed to make fast, precise, and repeatable changes to ride comfort and performance with a simple turn of a knob
part.bullet6: Provides optimum rebound performance that can be fine-tuned for any given rider weight, personal ride preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet7: Low friction sleeve bearings both top and bottom for ease of installation, this also allows the shock to float in its mount and avoid shock bind
part.bullet8: Hard anodized, 46 mm billet aluminum mono tube design utilizes a lightweight high flow piston design for improved fluid flow resulting in unmatched handling and bike control
part.bullet9: Hard chromed shaft is 14% larger for increased strength
part.bullet10: Internal floating nitrogen piston ensures consistent damping performance
part.bullet11: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet12: Legend's durable and low friction sealing system and sliding bearings provide improved performance and feel
part.bullet13: Available in Black Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet14: Easy installation that utilizes the OEM mounting hardware
part.bullet15: Included preload wrench makes adjusting easy
part.bullet16: Sold as Mono Shock (1 shock only)
part.bullet17: Designed for optimum performance with the Legend Axeo front suspension

part.partDescription: Legend Air Dyna Air Suspension - '06-'17 Dyna Models
part.productName: Air Dyna Air Suspension
part.bullet1: Legend AIR Suspensions systems sets the high mark in ultimate ride quality
part.bullet2: Exclusive Aramid Fiber air spring technology provides spring rate adjustability
part.bullet3: Air springs maximize wheel travel and adjust to any desired ride height
part.bullet4: Fitment accommodates 12" and 13" needs
part.bullet5: Easy installation and alignment, provided by spherical bearings on both top and bottom mounting points
part.bullet6: Type III hard-coat black anodized machined aluminum bodies
part.bullet7: Low friction sealing system and sliding bearings for improved performance and feel
part.bullet8: High flow piston reacts quickly for improved fluid flow management
part.bullet9: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet10: Includes prewired air compressor with model specific mounting
part.bullet11: Complete wire harness installs with three easy Deutsch connections
part.bullet12: Includes OEM-looking black handlebar mounted control for easy "on-the-go" adjustability
part.bullet13: Optional chrome handlebar mounted control sold separately (Part # 0616-0207)
part.bullet14: Made by hand in Sturgis, South Dakota, USA

part.partDescription: REVO ATS Adjustable Air-Assisted Coil Suspension
part.productName: REVO ATS - UTV Suspension System
part.bullet1: Legend’s patented design features an independently adjustable (front-to-rear) air-assisted coil suspension for hard-working utility UTV's
part.bullet2: Industry-exclusive, integrated helper air springs, offer a wide range of adjustability to improve ground clearance, chassis leveling, and reduce bottoming under heavy loads
part.bullet3: Designed to optimize ride quality and maintain the factory ride height of UTV's regardless of cargo, accessory, or attachment weights
part.bullet4: Custom coil spring rates improve ride quality when UTV is in an unloaded state
part.bullet5: Engineered to allow UTV's to be loaded to the OE manufacturer's GVWR without jeopardizing stability, safety, or comfort
part.bullet6: Aramid fiber-impregnated air springs provide high puncture resistance and unmatched durability
part.bullet7: Features heavy-duty 46 mm billet aluminum dampers with 16 mm hard chrome shafts for exceptional strength
part.bullet8: Easy access knob allows tool-free rebound adjustment for precise, fast, and repeatable adjustments for fine-tuning ride quality and performance across the entire damping profile
part.bullet9: Type III hard coat anodized for a long-lasting, durable finish
part.bullet10: Spherical bearings in mounting points eliminate suspension bind throughout the range of suspension travel
part.bullet11: Air pressure adjustments are easily made via a one-touch, wireless remote control and/or a Bluetooth mobile app
part.bullet12: Kit includes four shock assemblies, pre-mounted compressor assembly, remote control, wire harness, airline, and air fittings for easy installation
part.bullet13: Made in the USA
part.bullet14: Compatible with stock A-arms, not to be used with or as a lift kit.
part.bullet15: Not to be used with or as a lift kit.

part.partDescription: REVO-A Mono Shock - 13" - Standard - M-Eight Softail Models
part.productName: REVO-A Adjustable M-Eight Softail Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: Revo-A coil designed specifically for M-8 Softail models
part.bullet2: Available in 12.5", 13", and 13.5", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet3: Adjustable preload for rider set up, also allows for minimal pre-load adjustment when changing between rider's weights and loads
part.bullet4: Legend's touring specific spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet5: Features adjustable rebound damping that is specifically designed to make fast, precise, and repeatable changes to ride comfort and performance with a simple turn of a knob
part.bullet6: Provides optimum rebound performance that can be fine-tuned for any given rider weight, personal ride preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet7: Low friction sleeve bearings both top and bottom for ease of installation, this also allows the shock to float in its mount and avoid shock bind
part.bullet8: Hard anodized, 46 mm billet aluminum mono tube design utilizes a lightweight high flow piston design for improved fluid flow resulting in unmatched handling and bike control
part.bullet9: Hard chromed shaft is 14% larger for increased strength
part.bullet10: Internal floating nitrogen piston ensures consistent damping performance
part.bullet11: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet12: Legend's durable and low friction sealing system and sliding bearings provide improved performance and feel
part.bullet13: Available in Black Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet14: Easy installation that utilizes the OEM mounting hardware
part.bullet15: Included preload wrench makes adjusting easy
part.bullet16: Sold as Mono Shock (1 shock only)
part.bullet17: Designed for optimum performance with the Legend Axeo front suspension
part.bullet18: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD, USA

part.partDescription: Lift Kit - Rear - Tri-Glide
part.productName: Twin Cam Trike Rear Lift Kit
part.bullet1: Maximizes the rear ride height on '09 - '16 trikes by replacing the OEM lower shock mount brackets
part.bullet2: Relocates the lower shock mounting points, resulting in an additional 1-5/8" of ground clearance at the rear of the trike
part.bullet3: Levels out trike models that sit low in the rear from the factory
part.bullet4: Reduces dragging and scuffing of mufflers when rolling thru drain basins, backing up to curbs, or loading on a trailer
part.bullet5: Easier steering due to less trail in the front end
part.bullet6: Bolt-on installation
part.bullet7: Only for use with OEM length shocks (13")
part.bullet8: Made in the USA

part.bullet2: CNC machined billet aluminum reservoir clamps with powder coated steel mounts and stainless-steel hardware
part.bullet3: Compatible on all '14 -'24 FL Touring models equipped with a solid mount tour pack or H-D quick release docking hardware
part.bullet4: Compatible on some '09 -'13 FL Touring models (see notes)
part.bullet5: Simple installation
part.bullet6: Includes two mounting locations in one easy kit
part.bullet7: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: REVO Triglide Suspension - 13.6" - Black - Heavy Duty
part.productName: REVO Trike Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: 13.6" length maximizes rear ride height on '17 and newer trikes utilizing OEM shock mount plates
part.bullet2: Eliminates the need for a lift kit
part.bullet3: Levels out trike models that sit low in the rear from the factory
part.bullet4: Reduces dragging and scuffing of mufflers when rolling thru drain basins, backing up to curbs, or loading on a trailer
part.bullet5: Easier steering due to less trail in the front end
part.bullet6: Legend's touring specific coil spring rates provide superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet7: Adjusts by hand, no tools needed
part.bullet8: Trike specific spring rate
part.bullet9: Available only in Black Type III hard coat anodize

part.bullet11: High-flow piston improves fluid flow management and allows quick response
part.bullet12: Deflective disc valving self adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet13: Low friction sealing system and sliding bearings for improved performance and feel
part.bullet14: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD USA

part.partDescription: REVO-A Shock - 12.5" - Standard
part.productName: REVO-A Adjustable M-Eight Softail Coil Suspension
part.bullet1: All new Revo-A coil design for the M-Eight Softail
part.bullet2: Available in 12.5", 13", and 13.5", standard or heavy-duty applications
part.bullet3: Revo-A coil spring provides superior ride comfort, improved performance, and increased resistance to bottoming for all day comfort
part.bullet4: Provides optimum rebound performance that can be fine-tuned for any given rider weight, personal ride preference, or personal riding style
part.bullet5: Adjustable preload for rider set up, also allows for minimal pre-load adjustment when changing between rider's weights and loads
part.bullet6: Seven external knob adjustments allow fine-tuning of rebound utilizing needle valve technology to adapt to your riding style
part.bullet7: Low friction sleeve bearings both top and bottom for ease of installation, this also allows the shock to float in its mount and avoid shock bind
part.bullet8: Hard anodized, machined billet aluminum 46 mm mono tube utilizes a lightweight high flow piston design for improved fluid flow resulting in unmatched handling and bike control
part.bullet9: Hard chromed shaft is 14% larger for increased strength
part.bullet10: High quality chrome-silicon spring for consistent spring rate for the life of the motorcycle
part.bullet11: Internal floating nitrogen piston ensures consistent damping performance
part.bullet12: Deflective disc valving self-adjusts to frequency and ensures controlled performance
part.bullet13: Legend's durable and low friction sealing system and sliding bearings provide improved performance and feel
part.bullet14: Available in Black Type III hard coat anodize
part.bullet15: Easy installation and adjustment replacing the stock shock and mounts with original OEM hardware
part.bullet16: Sold as Mono Shock (1 shock only)
part.bullet17: Preload wrench included
part.bullet18: Designed for optimum performance with the Legend Axeo front suspension
part.bullet20: Made by hand in Sturgis, SD, USA

part.partDescription: AXEO Comfort Front Suspension System - 47 mm
part.productName: Legend AXEO Performance Front Suspension System
part.bullet1: Fully Customizable Suspension, engineered for riders who demand control; easily dial in suspension settings to match your exact riding style and conditions
part.bullet2: Split Function Cartridge Design-The Right fork controls the compression damping and the Left fork controls the rebound damping, allowing you to fine-tune each function independently for ultimate precision
part.bullet3: Tool-free compression and rebound adjustments
part.bullet4: External preload adjuster enables easy tuning for different rider weights with included adjustment tool
part.bullet5: Performance spring rate delivers agile handling for aggressive riders without sacrificing comfort
part.bullet6: Improves cornering clearance and minimizes dragging floorboards
part.bullet7: Improves ride quality, straight-line stability, high-speed cornering, and maneuverability

part.bullet11: Specifically designed to retain factory ride height on FL touring models

part.partDescription: Fairing Mounted LED Backlit PSI Gauges - Black
part.productName: Fairing Mounted LED Backlit PSI Gauges
part.bullet1: Fairing mounted, illuminated PSI gauge
part.bullet2: 0-150 PSI full sweep air pressure gauges by Auto Meter
part.bullet3: Colors and designs match factory gauges
part.bullet4: Easy direct installation replaces ambient air temperature gauges in '99-'13 fairings
part.bullet5: Plug-in wiring and color-matched LED bulbs so these look OEM
part.bullet6: Kit includes gauge, 8' of airline, tubing cutter, Y-fitting, and straight female fitting
part.bullet7: Black gauge accepts chrome bezel from stock gauge if desired
part.bullet8: Made in the USA
part.bullet9: Does not fit rocker box style gauge mount.
part.bullet10: Not intended for use with Softail AIR ride systems.
